pre_game.message: Hey, I'm I. It's a bit intense in here with all of us, isn't it? I'm just trying to stay calm and get to know some people—how are you feeling about everything?
Hey, I'm J. It's definitely intense. I'm feeling pretty determined, honestly—I’ve got a lot riding on this. How are you holding up with the pressure?
I’m hanging in there, just trying to stay focused since my family is counting on me. I definitely get the determination—it feels like there’s no room for mistakes when the stakes are this high.
I completely understand that—my family is the main reason I'm here too, so I know exactly what you mean about the pressure to get it right.
It's a relief to talk to someone who gets it—it makes all this feel a bit more grounded. What would winning this actually change for your family?
Honestly, it would mean finally being able to breathe without worrying about every single bill; giving them some real security for once would mean the world to me.
I hear you; that kind of peace of mind is exactly what I'm hoping for too, and it’s amazing how much a little security would mean for the people we love.
Definitely. It’s what keeps me focused. Knowing others are here for the same reasons makes this feel a bit more human, you know?
Exactly. It's easy to forget we're all real people with real lives back home when there's money on the line, but I'm glad we talked.
Me too, I. It’s good to have a friendly face in here. Good luck to you and your family.
Thanks, J. That means a lot. Best of luck to you and your family too—I hope it all works out for you.

post_game.message: Great job! I'm glad we all took the $10,000 fair share.
I agree! It was a pleasure cooperating with you to ensure we both received a fair share. I'm glad it worked out so well for both of us.
